title: mentha laevis
intro: Mentha laevis, also known as American mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, coughs, and colds due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Mentha laevis include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory function, and provide relief from headaches and fever. Mentha laevis is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be found in various forms, including essential oils and dried leaves.
